data.content:
Now I have the full picture. Here are the version conflicts:
- `System.Text.Json`: 10.0.1 vs 8.0.4 → **10.0.1**
- `Azure.Identity`: 1.13.2 vs 1.11.4 → **1.13.2**

Let me create `Directory.Packages.props` and update all project files.

arguments.file_text:
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageVersion Include="Azure.Identity" Version="1.13.2" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting" Version="8.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting" Version="1.15.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="10.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.9.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>

data.reasoningText:
Now I understand the structure. Let me identify all packages and their versions across projects:

| Package | Api | Worker | Shared | Tests |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 | 8.0.4 | 10.0.1 | 10.0.1 |
| Azure.Identity | 1.13.2 | - | 1.11.4 | - |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | - | 8.0.1 | - | - |
| OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | - | 1.15.0 | - | - |


| xunit | - | - | - | 2.9.3 |

I've spotted version conflicts: System.Text.Json has 10.0.1 in most places but 8.0.4 in Worker, and Azure.Identity differs between 1.13.2 and 1.11.4. I'll resolve these by using the higher versions. My plan is to create a centralized package management file with all the highest versions and then strip the version attributes from each project's references.

arguments.file_text:

  </PropertyGroup>

    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="10.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.9.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>

Done. Here's what I did:

**Created `Directory.Packages.props`** with centralized versions (highest wins):
- `Azure.Identity` → **1.13.2** (was 1.13.2 in Api, 1.11.4 in Shared)
- `System.Text.Json` → **10.0.1** (was 10.0.1 in Api/Shared/Tests, 8.0.4 in Worker)
- `Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting` → 8.0.1
- `OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting` → 1.15.0
- `xunit` → 2.9.3

**Updated all 4 `.csproj` files** — removed `Version` attributes from every `PackageReference`.
